debug_info.goal:
α✝ nt✝ : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α✝ nt✝
⊢ ∀ (dt : G.DerivationTree), dt.result.len = dt.collectLeaves'.length

failed_attempts:
induction dt
  case leaf => rfl
  case inner A children prod ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len, Word.mk]
    induction children with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons hd tl ih_l =>
      simp [Word.length_mul_eq_add, List.length_append, ih hd (List.mem_cons_self _ _), ih_l]

intro dt; induction dt
  . rfl
  . simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len]
    induction ‹List _›
    . rfl
    . simp [ih _ (List.mem_cons_self _ _), *]

intro dt
  induction dt
  · simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len]
  · rename_i ih
    induction ih <;> simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len, *]

intro dt
  induction dt
  case terminal c => rfl
  case node p cs h ih =>
    simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len]
    induction cs
    case nil => rfl
    case cons c cs ih' =>
      simp at *
      rw [ih c (List.mem_cons_self _ _), ih' (fun c' h' => ih c' (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h'))]

intro dt
  induction dt using ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.induction
  · rfl
  · next cs _ ih =>
    induction cs with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons c cs ih_cs =>
      simp [ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.result, ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.collectLeaves', Word.len, Word.length_mul_eq_add, ih c (List.mem_cons_self c cs), ih_cs]

intro dt
  induction dt
  case leaf c =>

  case node A children h ih =>

    induction children with

    | cons hd tl ih_tl =>

      rw [ih hd (List.mem_cons_self _ _), ih_tl]
      intro dt' h_mem; exact ih dt' (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h_mem)
